visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Inside a brightly lit Costco warehouse, a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a dark off-shoulder top, stands in front of a refrigerated meat aisle. She holds a transparent plastic box of beef wraps and smiles broadly at the camera. Other shoppers and metal carts are visible in the blurred background. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the beef wraps, showing detailed textures of the tortilla layers, red tomato slices, and white cheese fillings. Bright yellow and red text overlays with fire animations appear, emphasizing the product's scarcity. The lighting is very bright, typical of a retail environment, highlighting the colors of the food. (3) The scene transitions to a home interior. The woman is joined by a friend wearing a patterned bucket hat. They sit at a clean, white table with the open container of beef wraps. The background is a cozy, modern living room with soft lighting. They use enthusiastic facial expressions and point at the food. (4) A close-up shot focuses on a white Philips air fryer placed on a kitchen counter. A hand is seen turning the control dial and pulling out the cooking basket. The lighting is warm and natural. The camera uses a medium close-up to clearly show the digital interface of the appliance and the hand movements. (5) Back at the table, the women are shown in a medium shot, holding the heated beef wraps and taking bites. They use high-energy gestures, such as giving a thumbs up and touching their cheeks, to express their delight. The background remains the soft-lit living room, and more animated text overlays appear to emphasize their reactions.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 最後一盒. [Subtitle]: 最後一盒 最後一盒. (2) [Variety]: 不浪費年費! 鮮蔬牛肉捲. 一口入魂. [Subtitle]: 鮮蔬牛肉捲 最後一盒. (3) [Subtitle]: 而且他超多捲 我感覺這很適合 分食給大家庭使用. (4) [Subtitle]: 這個當早餐也很方便 就可以拿兩個袋子裝 不用自己切 很方便. (5) [Subtitle]: 現在一盒是416元 一公斤是447元 回去吃吃看好不好吃. (6) [Variety]: 肉多菜也多. [Subtitle]: 看起來是 肉多菜也多 而且還有牛番茄 現在牛番茄也很貴. (7) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它這個料像是 很誠意一樣哦 然後白白這一圈 是起司不是餅皮耶. (8) [Slogan]: 它是最後一盒. [Subtitle]: 你知道最棒的是什麼嗎 它是最後一盒 我會為了它. (9) [Slogan]: 續約好市多會員卡. 鮮蔬牛肉捲. 一口入魂. [Subtitle]: 續約好市多會員卡 這是吃過最厲害的鮮蔬牛肉捲. (10) [Subtitle]: 它的餅皮非常的香 然後加上它的蔬菜也很脆 裡面的厚厚乳酪. (11) [Subtitle]: 還有它厚厚的煙燻牛肉片 交疊在一起 很誠意 還有它的牛番茄 也是非常的鮮美. (12) [Subtitle]: 這個呢搭配一點點 辣味的美乃滋 所以你吃起來是有點 墨西哥辣椒香. (13) [Variety]: 在你舌尖上跳舞. [Subtitle]: 在你舌尖上跳舞 它呢 冷吃就好吃. (14) [Variety]: 世界好吃. [Subtitle]: 加熱後 世界好吃 大家一定要試試看. (15) [Subtitle]: 進階吃法 氣炸鍋180度3分鐘出來 它裡面的那個 哈伐第乾酪 會完美的跟牛肉片 還有牛番茄交織在一起 那個口感哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 然後餅皮就會 變得酥酥脆脆的 吃到那個 餅皮的麵香哦. (17) [Subtitle]: 這算是不管 冷吃熱吃都好吃 這個值得外銷全世界 你一定要買.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wearing a black beret and black off-shoulder top; another woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse with shelves and shoppers; domestic living room with soft lighting and home decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female narrator speaking at a rapid pace with high pitch variability. She sounds extremely friendly and animated. A bright, high-tempo electronic pop track plays in the background at a moderate volume, providing a driving 4/4 rhythm. Subtle supermarket ambient noise is present but very low in the mix. (2) A sharp, bright 'ding' sound effect marks a transition to a close-up discussion. The narrator's voice maintains its high arousal and positive valence as she details the product's price. The music continues without interruption, keeping the energy level high. Vocal clarity is exceptional, indicating professional post-production. (3) A synthesized 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a scene change to a domestic setting. A second female voice enters, matching the energetic and cheerful tone of the first. Their speech patterns overlap slightly, creating a natural, conversational feel. The background music maintains its steady tempo and instrumentation. (4) Audible mechanical 'clicks' and a digital notification 'beep' occur during the air fryer demonstration. The sound of the air fryer's internal fan whirring is briefly audible. The narrators continue to speak with high enthusiasm, their voices remaining the dominant signal over the low-level ambient indoor sounds. (5) The final phase features both voices providing a strong recommendation with an increase in vocal volume and intensity. The background music reaches its climax with a more pronounced beat before ending with a final percussive hit. The overall signal-to-noise ratio is high, and the audio production feels polished and targeted for social media.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To recommend a specific Costco food product (beef wraps) by showing its value, ingredients, and a specific cooking method (air frying) to enhance the taste, targeting budget-conscious and food-loving viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the product, detailed review of its benefits, and mention of membership value.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, well-edited short video that effectively uses text overlays and split narratives to engage the audience.
